ops.find_block:
const { action, prompt, session_id, title } = await req.json();

  // ACTION: LIST SESSIONS

if (!keyData) return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "No active Gemini API keys found. Check your 'api_keys' table for 'service'='gemini' and 'is_active'=true." }), { status: 500, headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" } });
    
    await supabase.from('api_keys').update({ last_used_at: now }).eq('id', keyData.id);

operations.find_block:
const { action, prompt, session_id, title } = await req.json();

  // ACTION: LIST SESSIONS

if (!keyData) return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "No active Gemini API keys found. Check your 'api_keys' table for 'service'='gemini' and 'is_active'=true." }), { status: 500, headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" } });
    
    await supabase.from('api_keys').update({ last_used_at: now }).eq('id', keyData.id);
